_comment: Phase 3: Sequence-order loss — LSTM causal predictor on DiT token features

P3-A.name: Large DiT 300 epochs + pos_channel only (Phase 2 winner repeated)

P3-B.name: Large DiT 300 epochs + pos_channel + sequence-order loss (w=0.5) (WINNER)

P3-C.name: Large DiT + pos_channel + sequence loss + coherence loss

sequence_loss_description.mechanism: Causal LSTM takes per-token features from x0_pred in row-major order, predicts next-token features
sequence_loss_description.backprop_path: LSTM loss → x0_pred → noise_pred → DiT weights

finding: Sequence-order loss at weight=0.5 is the critical missing ingredient for sentence structure. P3-C (adding coherence) did not improve over P3-B.
